name: cycle
description: Autonomous work-loop driver scoped to the session's ACTIVE DOMAIN (commons @D g58). The WHOLE family now auto-continues to DEPLETION: each round self-feeds from open milestones (else auto-seeds from `## deferred`), self-continues via ScheduleWakeup, and terminates only when open milestones = 0 AND deferred empty AND no other signal — so every command digs the declared backlog to the bottom on its own (per-round cap throttles WIDTH, auto-continue provides DEPTH; user can interrupt any round). Four commands: /cycle — read the active <NAME>.md snapshot, enumerate its open `- [ ]` milestones (off-domain work is forbidden; if no active domain, prompt for `/domain set <NAME>` first); if the next-list is empty, auto-seed ≤N (default 3) candidate milestones — PRIMARY signal = the domain's OWN `## deferred` section (promote the next batch into the milestone board + drain it from deferred so the domain self-feeds its declared backlog), then user hint · prior-turn /gap shortlist · log-tail open thread — via `/domain milestone <text>` per item, then re-enumerate (no-signal case = zero milestones + empty deferred + no signal stops with steer-options rather than fabricating); → dup-race precheck (3-signal grep: INBOX.log.md entry status + merged PR + git log) → parallel-plan table → fan-out (one background Agent per item, same message) → auto-continue to depletion (depletion-driving by default, not single-round-then-stop). /cycle-full — one-time phase-0 depletion brainstorm (rounds until no novel ideas, cap 8) on $ARGUMENTS within the active domain, then the same precheck → plan-table → fan-out → auto-continue tail (phase 0 is one-time per goal; subsequent rounds use plain /cycle semantics, self-feeding from deferred, draining to depletion). /cycle-loop — bare /cycle handed to the `loop` skill for explicit continuous intent + dynamic ScheduleWakeup pacing; same depletion termination (bare /cycle now reaches the same end-state inline — /cycle-loop is the explicit-pacing surface). /cycle-full-loop — /cycle-full once (one-time brainstorm + first fan-out) then handed to /loop /cycle, draining to the same depletion condition. All four share the cap + 5-stage structure + plan-table + dup-race precheck + leak guardrails; they differ only in entry/pacing shape. Distinct from all-bg-go (reactive fan-out of PRIOR-turn branches; /cycle self-generates the next batch each round). NL triggers: /cycle · /cycle-full · /cycle-loop · /cycle-full-loop · 사이클 · 계속 진행 · 다음 라운드 · keep cycling · march on.
